diagrams.title: STRIPS Operator Structure
diagrams.description: Box diagram showing components of a STRIPS operator: Name/Parameters, Preconditions (requirements), Effects (split into Add list and Delete list)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how actions are represented in classical planning formalism

diagrams.title: Forward vs Backward Search Flowchart
diagrams.description: Two flowcharts showing progression (initial→goal) and regression (goal→initial) planning approaches with decision points
diagrams.purpose: Comparing the two main state-space search strategies in planning

diagrams.title: Planning Graph Structure
diagrams.description: Layered graph showing alternating action levels (A0, A1) and proposition levels (P0, P1, P2) with mutex links between incompatible elements
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how GraphPlan represents planning problems and extracts solutions

diagrams.title: Partial-Order Plan DAG
diagrams.description: Directed Acyclic Graph showing actions as nodes with ordering constraints as edges. Shows flexible ordering where some actions can happen in parallel
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing non-linear plan structures and action dependencies
